description_long: This is a modern civilian helicopter with a streamlined, aerodynamic fuselage painted primarily in red with white accent lines. The helicopter features a large, rounded cockpit with expansive blue-tinted windows that wrap around the front and sides, providing excellent visibility for the pilot and passengers. The main rotor consists of two long, black blades, while the tail section is equipped with a smaller tail rotor for stability and control. The landing gear comprises two sturdy red skids with crossbars for support, designed for stable ground contact. The tail boom is slender and extends to a vertical stabilizer with a horizontal fin, both accented in red and white. No visible registration numbers or markings are present on the exterior.
description: A sleek red civilian helicopter with blue-tinted wraparound cockpit windows, black main and tail rotors, and red landing skids.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, large blue cockpit windows, and the main rotor blades extending horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, red skids, and the full length of the tail boom with the tail rotor visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical layout of the main rotor blades.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit windows, skids, and tail structure.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, straight, black main rotor blades made of composite material, each extending symmetrically from the rotor hub with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small, two-bladed tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, colored black with no visible markings or protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel red landing skids with crossbars for structural support, made of metal tubing and attached to the lower fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Four large, blue-tinted cockpit windows wrap around the front and sides, with rounded edges and minimal visible framing.
